title: Observing Eyeblossom
description: Instead of blooming at night, eyeblossoms now open up when looked at by the player!
body:
# Observing Eyeblossom

Eyeblossoms are a great addition to Minecraft — but they only bloom at night.

This lightweight mod changes the behavior of the mysterious flower: the Eyeblossom now knows when it’s being observed and will open up when someone looks at it!

![The player looks at the eyeblossoms in the pale garden and they open up as they are being looked at.](https://i.imgur.com/TZeEBhA.gif)

# Exciting Redstone Possibilities

Take your redstone contraptions to the next level with “being looked at” interactions. Open doors, trigger mechanisms, and create entirely new gameplay possibilities just by looking at them!

![The player looks slowly at a closed door, which then opens by its own just by looking at it.](https://i.imgur.com/b2VxUOl.gif)
